reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para tomar un desayuno,  lastima que el café estaba quemado, y las medialunas muy tostadas casi duras, los empleados atendieron a reglamento no me gusto el servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Good place for breakfast, it's a shame the coffee was burnt, and the croissants were very toasted, almost hard. The employees followed the rules, but I didn't like the service.

reviews.comment:
Encantada con el lugar, aire fresco, naturaleza, plaza, el mantenimiento es impecable!! No lo conocía hasta ayer y la verdad será mi parada segura en cada viaje!

(Translated by Google)
I'm delighted with the place—fresh air, nature, a lovely plaza—and the upkeep is impeccable! I didn't know about it until yesterday, and it will definitely be my go-to stop on every trip!
